Connect your database 🗄️

PlenusOS uses Supabase to store your client data securely. Create a free account at supabase.com, then paste your Project URL and Anon Key below.

🔒 Your anon key is designed to be used client-side. Row Level Security means users can only see their own data.

New to Supabase? Create a free account

1
Practice Details
Your name, practice name, contact information
Used across your site and by your AI assistant
Shown on invoices and client communications
Appears on your website and in client-facing materials
2
Brand & Identity
Colours, fonts, logo — how your practice looks to clients
Used for buttons, headings, and brand accents
PNG or SVG, transparent background recommended
3
Connections
Database, AI, payments — the engines that power your practice
🗄️
Supabase
Stores all client data, notes, and appointments securely
✅ Connected — data is saving
✨
AI (Claude)
Powers all content generation — plans, notes, social posts, emails
💳
Stripe
Card payments, invoices, subscriptions
⚠️ Publishable key only — never your secret key
🅿️
PayPal
Alternative payment option for clients
📧
Email (SMTP)
Sends appointment reminders and client emails from your address
4
Notifications
When you get alerted and how

New client enquiry

Alert when a lead comes in via your website

Appointment reminders

24 hours and 1 hour before each session

Payment received

When a client pays an invoice

Community activity

When members post in your community

Weekly practice summary

Every Monday morning — clients, revenue, upcoming week

5
Data & GDPR
Your compliance obligations as a health practitioner

PlenusOS processes health data under UK GDPR Article 9 (special category data) with explicit client consent. As the data controller, you are responsible for having the right documentation in place.

Data Processing Agreement

Required for Article 9 health data processing

Privacy Policy

Your practice privacy policy — we can generate a starting draft

Consent Forms

Article 9 health data consent — clients sign before their first session

Data Retention Period

How long client records are kept after their last session

6
Your Availability
When you're open for bookings — clients only see these windows

🌐https://nutriflow.uk● Live
Hero Section — click to edit

Transform Your Health With Expert Nutritional Therapy

I help busy women overcome fatigue, bloating, and hormonal imbalances through personalised nutrition plans rooted in clinical science — and real food you'll actually enjoy.

About Section
H

Hi, I'm Helen — Nutritional Therapist & Gut Health Specialist

I'm a registered nutritional therapist (mBANT, CNHC) with a passion for helping women feel energised, balanced, and in control of their health. After struggling with my own gut issues for years, I found the transformative power of food as medicine — and I've dedicated my career to sharing that with my clients.

Services Section

How I Can Help You

Choose the right level of support for where you are right now

🔬

Initial Consultation

A deep-dive 60-minute session to uncover the root causes of your symptoms and build your personalised nutrition plan.

£85
🌱

12-Week Programme

My signature programme combining weekly 1-to-1 sessions, a bespoke meal plan, and full supplement protocol.

£497
🎓

Gut Reset Course

A self-paced online course covering the fundamentals of gut health, with video lessons, recipes, and a meal plan.

£147
Testimonials Section

What Clients Say

★★★★★

"Within 6 weeks my bloating had completely gone and I had more energy than I'd had in years. Helen's approach is thorough, warm, and genuinely life-changing."

— Sarah T., London
★★★★★

"I'd tried everything before finding Helen. Her personalised meal plan and supplement protocol sorted my gut issues in a way no GP ever had. Can't recommend highly enough."

— Emma R., Manchester
Contact / CTA Section

Ready to Feel Like Yourself Again?

Book a free 20-minute discovery call and let's talk about how I can help you get your energy, digestion, and health back on track.

Or email: hello@nutriflow.uk

Contact
Clinical Snapshot
Consent: ⚪ Not recorded Health data — AI processing — Marketing —
Practitioner Notes
No notes recorded yet.
Consent Record
UK GDPR compliant — one record per consent type, immutable once saved
Health Data Processing Consent (UK GDPR Article 9 — Special Category)
Explicit consent to collect, process, and retain health and dietary information for the purpose of providing nutritional therapy. Required before any clinical records can be created.
Not yet recorded
⚠ Required
AI-Assisted Care Consent (Required for AI features)
Consent to process pseudonymised health data using AI tools (Anthropic Claude). Required before AI-assisted SOAP notes and care plans can be generated.
Not yet recorded
⚠ Required
Marketing Communications Consent (Optional — PECR)
Consent to receive newsletters, health resources, and programme updates. Independent of clinical consent — optional, can be declined without affecting care.
Not yet recorded
Optional
